project.name: Bunya-Jido
project.summary: Validated task routes for changes to grounded semantic publication.

task_routes.intent: Modify publication blockers or grounding metrics while preserving the trust contract.
contracts: Core node and critical edge evidence must remain inspectable before semantic publication.
watch_out: A weakened blocker changes whether output is allowed to claim Grounded status.

task_routes.intent: Modify deterministic Studio readability or scenario-quality diagnostics without presenting subjective editorial judgment as proof.
contracts: Deterministic blockers and warnings must remain separate from review-required editorial judgments.
watch_out: A heuristic warning must not silently become a publication claim about the best explanation.

task_routes.intent: Adjust agent-map validation or the task-route paths shown in rendered maps.
contracts: Only routes validated against repository-relative inputs may reach trusted context or HTML paths.
watch_out: Context output and viewer path presets must continue to share the same validated routes.

task_routes.intent: Improve how grounded status, evidence, or semantic paths are presented offline.
contracts: The viewer must display published trust information without becoming the evidence source.
watch_out: A visual change must keep the offline standalone artifact readable and truthful.
